      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity with type parameters of type Graph 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractEditorActivity<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This abstract activity permits to edit an document with the NetEditor API.
      class  FigureView<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This view permits to draw NetEditor figures on an Droid view.

    • Uses of Graph in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory with type parameters of type Graph 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractFigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This class is a factory of figures that permits to create a figure and bind it to a model element.
      class  AbstractStandardFigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This class is a factory of standard figures that permits to create a figure and bind it to a model element.
      interface  FigureFactory<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This interface is a factory of figures that permits to create a figure and bind it to a model element.

    • Uses of Graph in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism with type parameters of type Graph 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractAnchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the Anchor that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      class  AbstractEdge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject classe for representing edges between anchors.
      class  AbstractNode<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.
      interface  Anchor<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the connection point that permit to connect Edges and Nodes.
      interface  Edge<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      Abstract ModelObject class for representing edges between anchors.
      interface  Graph<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for graph models.
      interface  Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
      This is the semantic object for nodes.

      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  JFigureView<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
      This class provides a viewer for manipulating graphical network The editor (JFigurePanel) is the central class of the graph editing framework.
